vvRequirements.target: Redirect endpoint p95 latency under nominal load.
vvRequirements.measurement: Server-side p95 latency measured over rolling 5-minute windows via Prometheus histogram.

source_ref.excerpt: Redirect endpoint p95 latency must be ≤ 100ms over a rolling 5-minute window.

vvRequirements.target: All stored URL mappings are encrypted at rest.
vvRequirements.measurement: Periodic audit of random row sample.
vvRequirements.threshold: 100% of sampled rows have encrypted_url != plaintext.

source_ref.excerpt: Monthly audit verifies all mappings remain encrypted.
